nasb.text: Their herdsmen ran away and reported it in the city and in the country. And the people came to see what it was that had happened.

esv.text: The herdsmen fled and told it in the city and in the country. And people came to see what it was that had happened.

cnv.text: 放豬的人都逃跑了，到城裡和各鄉村去報告，大家就來看發生了甚麼事。

ccb.text: 放猪的人都吓跑了。他们把这消息传遍了城里乡间，于是人人都跑来看个究竟。

csbs.text: 那些放猪的人就逃跑了，去把这事传到城里城外。于是人们就来看发生了什么事。
